Instruction: Walk straight ahead along the paved sidewalk, keeping the tall building with the dark lower section on your left. Continue forward on the reddish-brown path, passing various glass-fronted shops on your left and a line of trees on your right. Keep going straight until you reach a major intersection. On the corner to your left, you will see a building featuring a brightly lit Burger King and a large digital billboard above a glass entrance. Stop at the edge of the sidewalk right in front of the wide crosswalk marked with thick white stripes. This crosswalk is your destination.
